code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网边缘设备设计一个自适应的视觉检测状态机。核心诉求是：同一套算法要能根据硬件档次、实时负载和电池状态自动降级或升级。
明白，自适应的核心是"感知-决策-执行"的闭环。我理解的起点是TelemetryStream触发AppInitialization，然后进入PerformanceAssessment做基线评估。这个入口逻辑对吗？
对。PerformanceAssessment之后要拆两条线：DeviceCapabilityCheck做硬件分级，同时ContinuousMonitoring跑起来做持续监控。
硬件分级我想到四层：UltraFastMode给低端设备、FastMode中端、BalancedMode高端、HighQualityMode旗舰。用InitialModeSelection做路由，你看这个分层合理吗？
分层合理，但每个模式内部的状态要体现资源消耗的递进关系。比如BalancedMode里，从FullResolution到CompleteFaceDetection再到FullNSFWDetection，最后加上GenderClassification，这条链要完整。
好的，BalancedMode内部我画成：FullResolution → CompleteFaceDetection → FullNSFWDetection → GenderClassification → OptimalBatteryUsage → PerformanceMonitoring。同时我在右侧加注释说明这是推荐模式，原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%每小时耗电。
HighQualityMode要体现旗舰特性：EnhancedResolution启动，走AdvancedFaceDetection、EnhancedNSFWDetection、DetailedGenderClassification，再加上ContentDensityAnalysis做内容密度分析，这是其他模式没有的。

收到，HighQualityMode内部链：EnhancedResolution → AdvancedFaceDetection → EnhancedNSFWDetection → DetailedGenderClassification → ContentDensityAnalysis → HighBatteryUsage → PerformanceMonitoring。注释标注3000ms间隔、12-15%耗电、最大精度。
低端设备的UltraFastMode要极简：QuarterResolution配BasicFaceDetection，只做MinimalProcessing，LowBatteryUsage收尾。注释写清楚224x224分辨率、500ms间隔、2%耗电。

UltraFastMode已落实：QuarterResolution → BasicFaceDetection → MinimalProcessing → LowBatteryUsage → PerformanceMonitoring。FastMode我同步处理为HalfResolution → FaceDetection → BasicNSFWDetection → ModerateBatteryUsage → PerformanceMonitoring，填补中端空白。
现在设计ContinuousMonitoring的监控维度。需要CPUUsageCheck、MemoryUsageCheck、BatteryLevelCheck、ThermalStateCheck、NetworkLatencyCheck，最后汇总到PerformanceDecision做决策。
PerformanceDecision之后分三条出口：MaintainCurrentMode性能良好时保持、DegradePerformance有问题时降级、ImprovePerformance资源充裕时升级。这个三分支结构对吗？
正确。DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance都要有详细的内部状态链。降级时先ReduceDetectionFrequency，再LowerResolution，然后DisableNonEssentialFeatures，最后OptimizeMemoryUsage。

DegradePerformance内部链：ReduceDetectionFrequency → LowerResolution → DisableNonEssentialFeatures → IncreaseCacheUsage → OptimizeMemoryUsage。升级链ImprovePerformance：IncreaseDetectionQuality → HigherResolution → EnableAdditionalFeatures → ReduceCacheDependency → EnhancePrecision。
三条性能调整路径最终都要汇入AdaptiveAdjustment做统一适配。里面包含ApplyChanges、TestNewSettings、ValidatePerformance、UpdateConfiguration四个步骤，然后返回ContinuousMonitoring。
AdaptiveAdjustment结构已确认：ApplyChanges → TestNewSettings → ValidatePerformance → UpdateConfiguration，然后标注"Return to Monitoring"回到ContinuousMonitoring。现在需要处理异常分支吗？
需要三个异常分支。第一是EmergencyMode：当Critical Performance Issue触发时，进入MinimalDetection → CriticalFeaturesOnly → MaximumCaching → EmergencyOptimization → GradualRecovery，恢复后返回监控。
EmergencyMode已添加：从ContinuousMonitoring触发，内部链MinimalDetection → CriticalFeaturesOnly → MaximumCaching → EmergencyOptimization → GradualRecovery，出口标注"Performance Recovered"回ContinuousMonitoring。
第二个异常是BatteryOptimization：Low Battery Detected时触发，走ReduceProcessingFrequency → DisableBackgroundFeatures → MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks → EnableDeepCaching → BatterySaveMode，电池改善后返回。
BatteryOptimization已落实：ReduceProcessingFrequency → DisableBackgroundFeatures → MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks → EnableDeepCaching → BatterySaveMode，出口"Battery Level Improved"回ContinuousMonitoring。
第三个是ThermalThrottling：Overheating Detected时，ReduceProcessorUsage → IncreaseProcessingIntervals → DisableGPUAcceleration → CooldownPause → ThermalRecovery，温度正常后返回。
ThermalThrottling已完成：ReduceProcessorUsage → IncreaseProcessingIntervals → DisableGPUAcceleration → CooldownPause → ThermalRecovery，出口"Temperature Normal"回ContinuousMonitoring。
最后加一个用户主动干预分支UserModeChange：用户改设置时触发，走ValidateUserChoice → ApplyUserSettings → WarnIfIncompatible → AcceptOverride，兼容则应用，不兼容也要允许强制覆盖。
UserModeChange已添加：ValidateUserChoice → ApplyUserSettings → WarnIfIncompatible → AcceptOverride，出口"Settings Applied"回ContinuousMonitoring。

我检查一下各模式的硬件载体标注。UltraFastMode和BalancedMode用IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，FastMode和ImprovePerformance用IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic，HighQualityMode用IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController，EmergencyMode和AdaptiveAdjustment用IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。
发现一处需要修正：ContinuousMonitoring本身也应该标注载体。我统一为IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，因为监控逻辑跑在边缘节点上。其他载体分配确认无误。
修正合理。最后确认一下整体闭环：所有异常分支和用户干预最终都回到ContinuousMonitoring，形成完整的自适应循环。
确认闭环完整。状态机包含：4个硬件分级模式、1个持续监控核心、3个性能调整路径、3个异常处理分支、1个用户干预分支，全部通过AdaptiveAdjustment或直连方式回归监控循环。图示可以定稿。
